gateway.name: Edith SAML Gateway
gateway.description: Centralized SAML proxy for Edith Core — routes all assertions between IdPs and SPs

idpProviders.name: Edith Bank
idpProviders.description: Edith Bank SSO — bank customers access Edith Core

idpProviders.name: Jarvis Bank
idpProviders.description: Jarvis Bank SSO — Jarvis customers access Edith Core

idpProviders.name: Meridian Bank
idpProviders.description: Meridian Bank SSO — partner bank federation

idpProviders.name: Summit Credit Union
idpProviders.description: Summit Credit Union SSO — credit union members

spProviders.name: Edith Wire
spProviders.description: Domestic and international wire transfer service

spProviders.name: Edith Mobile API
spProviders.description: Mobile banking API gateway with SAML bridge

spProviders.name: Edith Trade
spProviders.description: Letters of credit and trade finance

routes.name: Bank SSO to Core
routes.description: Edith Bank users SSO into Edith Core
routes.assertionFlow: edith-bank signs assertion -> gateway validates -> gateway creates core session

routes.name: Jarvis SSO to Core
routes.description: Jarvis Bank users SSO into Edith Core
routes.assertionFlow: jarvis-bank signs assertion -> gateway validates -> gateway creates core session

routes.name: Meridian SSO to Core

routes.assertionFlow: meridian-bank signs assertion -> gateway validates -> gateway creates core session

routes.name: Summit SSO to Core

routes.assertionFlow: summit-cu signs assertion -> gateway validates -> gateway creates core session

routes.name: Atlas SSO to Core
routes.description: Atlas Financial users SSO into Edith Core
routes.assertionFlow: atlas signs assertion -> gateway validates -> gateway creates core session

routes.name: Pinnacle SSO to Core
routes.description: Pinnacle Bank users SSO into Edith Core via ADFS
routes.assertionFlow: pinnacle ADFS signs assertion -> gateway validates -> gateway creates core session

routes.name: Core to RDC
routes.description: Core users SSO into Remote Deposit Capture
routes.assertionFlow: gateway signs assertion with core IdP key -> POST to RDC ACS
